message:
feat(mermaid): add C4 diagram parser+IR for all 5 variants (bd-hudcn.1.14.1)

Add typed parsing for C4Context, C4Container, C4Component, C4Dynamic,
and C4Deployment diagrams. Previously all C4 lines were dispatched to
Statement::Raw; now they are parsed into typed C4Element, C4Relation,
C4BoundaryStart/End, and C4Title statements.

Changes:
- New structs: C4Element, C4Relation, C4Boundary
- New Statement variants: C4Element, C4Relation, C4BoundaryStart,
  C4BoundaryEnd, C4Title
- parse_c4_line() handles all element types (Person, System, Container,
  Component + Db/Queue/Ext variants), boundary types (Enterprise_Boundary,
  System_Boundary, Container_Boundary, Deployment_Node), relationship types
  (Rel, BiRel, Rel_U/D/L/R/Back, RelIndex), and title/styling directives
- parse_c4_args() for comma-separated quoted argument parsing
- IR normalization: elements→nodes, relations→edges, boundaries→clusters
- Compatibility matrix upgraded from Unsupported to Partial for all 5 C4 types
- Updated mermaid_fixtures.rs: C4 fixtures no longer expect raw fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -521,6 +521,7 @@ mod tests {
         xy_chart: usize,
         sankey: usize,
         raw: usize,
+        c4: usize,
     }
 
     fn count_statements(statements: &[Statement]) -> AstCounts {
@@ -556,9 +557,18 @@ mod tests {
                 Statement::RequirementDef(_)
                 | Statement::RequirementRelation(_)
                 | Statement::RequirementElement(_) => counts.requirement += 1,
-                Statement::TimelineSection { .. } | Statement::TimelineEvent(_) => counts.timeline += 1,
-                Statement::XyChartXAxis { .. } | Statement::XyChartYAxis { .. } | Statement::XyChartSeries(_) => counts.xy_chart += 1,
+                Statement::TimelineSection { .. } | Statement::TimelineEvent(_) => {
+                    counts.timeline += 1
+                }
+                Statement::XyChartXAxis { .. }
+                | Statement::XyChartYAxis { .. }
+                | Statement::XyChartSeries(_) => counts.xy_chart += 1,
                 Statement::SankeyLink(_) => counts.sankey += 1,
+                Statement::C4Element(_)
+                | Statement::C4Relation(_)
+                | Statement::C4BoundaryStart(_)
+                | Statement::C4BoundaryEnd { .. }
+                | Statement::C4Title { .. } => counts.c4 += 1,
                 Statement::Raw { .. } => counts.raw += 1,
             }
         }
@@ -592,6 +602,7 @@ mod tests {
             + c.timeline
             + c.xy_chart
             + c.sankey
+            + c.c4
             + c.raw
     }
